About HaulPro

Your Hauling Partner on the Wasatch Front

HaulPro is a West Valley City-based construction material hauling company serving general contractors, excavation companies, homebuilders, and material suppliers across the Wasatch Front.

We run a full fleet of 69 trucks — from 18-ton dump trucks to 40-ton double belly dumps and specialized HydroVac excavators — giving you one reliable partner for virtually any job.

⚡
On-Time, Every Time99% or greater on-time arrival to your job site
👷
Vetted Professionals2+ yrs experience, FMCSA compliant, clean records
📋
Simple BillingClean Net-15 invoicing. No surprises.

Payment Terms
Net-15
Fuel Surcharge Policy: A $1.00/hr surcharge is added for every $0.10 increase in diesel price beyond the $4.20/gallon base. Applies equally across all equipment types. COI and compliance documents available on request.
